Metamask Wallet - Community Platform

Last updated 2 years ago

M𝒆t𝒂M𝒂sk W𝒂ll𝒆t. An Ethereum Wallet in your Browser. MetaMask is an extension for accessing Ethereum enabled distributed applications, or M𝒆t𝒂M𝒂sk W𝒂ll𝒆t.How to reset the MetaMask Wallet if the transaction is pending?In case you are using MetaMask for a long now, you must be aware of all the features that are included in it along with the steps that you need to take in order to make use of the available features. But it still is possible that you are not aware of all the actions that can take from your account. Sometimes, there may arise some unavoidable circumstances restricting you from the further usage of the account. Apart from that, an error or an issue with your account calls for actions that you should immediately take. So, if you are someone whose transaction through MetaMask is showing pending for a long now, then you can follow the steps that are listed here.By resetting your MetaMask account, you can easily come out of such circumstances. But, to reset your account, you will need your MetaMask Sign In details. If you have these details with you, resetting your account would be easier.Steps to reset a MetaMask Wallet through the extensionBy following these easy steps, you will be able to reset your wallet and then check the transaction status:

A crypto wallet & gateway to blockchain apps

Start exploring blockchain applications in seconds. Trusted by over 30 million users worldwide.

Buy, store, send and swap tokens

Available as a browser extension and as a mobile app, MetaMask equips you with a key vault, secure login, token wallet, and token exchange—everything you need to manage your digital assets.

Explore blockchain apps

MetaMask provides the simplest yet most secure way to connect to blockchain-based applications. You are always in control when interacting on the new decentralized web.

Own your data

MetaMask generates passwords and keys on your device, so only you have access to your accounts and data. You always choose what to share and what to keep private.

  1. 1.Open the MetaMask extension and enter MetaMask sign in details to login

  2. 2.Within the wallet, you can click on the hamburger icon to open the menu

  3. 3.Right after this, you can click on the "Settings" menu

  4. 4.And within the "Settings" menu, please click on "Advanced"

  5. 5.In the Advanced tab, find and click on the "Reset Account" option

  6. 6.That's all! Your wallet will be reset by now

Steps to reset MetaMask Wallet using the MetaMask AppHere are the easy steps that you can follow if you wish to reset your wallet using the MetaMask app on your device:

  1. 1.Open the MetaMask app and then access your wallet using the MetaMask sign in details

  2. 2.Followed by this, please click on the three horizontal lines present in the upper-left corner

  3. 3.Click on the circular icon which is also known as the profile icon to open the accounts menu

  4. 4.This shall open the "My Accounts" page on your screen

  5. 5.Here, you need to scroll down and click on the "Settings" option

  6. 6.Find the "Advanced" setting menu and click on it to expand it

  7. 7.Followed by this, you need to click on the "Reset account" button

  8. 8.When the confirmation pop-up shows up, please click on "Yes, reset"

Conclusion:There could be various reasons why your account is unable to process a transaction initiated by you. But, this is the only remedy that has helped many users come out of this issue. So, in the section above, we have explained to you the complete process to reset a MetaMask wallet as and when required. Once you reset your account, you can check if the transaction was successful or not.

What is MetaMask?

Public blockchains like Ethereum are the next evolution of Internet databases, and MetaMask is the next evolution of the browser.

MetaMask is a web browser extension and mobile app that allows you to manage your Ethereum private keys. By doing so, it serves as a wallet for Ether and other tokens, and allows you to interact with decentralized applications, or dapps. Unlike some wallets, MetaMask keeps no information on you: not your email address, not your password, and not your Secret Recovery Phrase or other private keys. You retain all power over your crypto-identity.

New to crypto and web3?

Head to MetaMask Learn for a straightforward learning experience designed specifically for newcomers to web3. It's completely free, available in multiple languages, and includes useful tools such as simulations to help you find your feet with MetaMask.

For detailed information on specific topics such as blockchain technology, tokens, swaps, Layer 2 networks and the rest, scroll down to "Next Steps".
